temporal_oof.large_under_note: mean signed log-error on actual >=$60M (negative = under-predict). The point estimate stays pedigree-gated and conservative by design; an ungated demand pathway was tested and rejected (reversed out-of-fold). Large-film coverage is handled separately by a demand-forward >=$50M flag (V30 v2: 50% holdout recall, 100% precision). Note: an earlier 'demand-quiet giants' reading was corrected after a July 2026 Wikipedia data-integrity fix.

generations.note: CatBoost+Linear blend + HDR/BAYES + demand-forward >=50M flag (v2). Holdout aLoss 0.600 vs v28b 0.766, flop-over 5% vs 24%; demand-forward flag 50% large-recall vs pedigree 0% after Wikipedia data fix
